[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100110001 5
1 1111001011 7
2 1010110001 5
3 1011010100 5
4 0100000010 2
5 1001100010 4
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 1110011111 8
12 0111101110 7
23 1100110101 6
34 1111001111 8
45 1110111011 8
56 1011111101 8
67 0110011111 7
70 1001100010 4 match 5

02 1111011111 9
13 0101111100 6
24 1101111111 9
35 1111101011 8

71 1011110011 7
